issues.title: Eternal Terminal (step 1): per-tab /save-tab + /restore-tab (layout + content)
issues.suggested_reply: Hi @DDKinger, CI is failing on `check-spelling` — quick scan points at the status check/report rather than a merge conflict, but could you take a look at https://github.com/microsoft/intelligent-terminal/runs/85550128776? If it is flaky, push an empty commit to re-run.

issues.title: Setting delegateAgent to a different agent than acpAgent crashes master process (wta-master pipe connect failure)
issues.suggested_reply:
Sorry you hit a crash @Aust-aa-36. For crashes specifically we need the
backend diagnostic data, which you can capture via Feedback Hub:
<https://aka.ms/intelligent-terminal-feedback>. Pick the matching
category, hit "Share My Feedback" after submitting, and paste the link
here.

I can also see the startup failure text you included: <!-- from body -->helper ACP transport failed: connect to master pipe '\\.\pipe\wta-master-<GUID>' after 21 attempt(s): The system cannot find the file specified. (os error 2)<!-- /from body -->.

Without the Feedback Hub data we can't correlate the crash to a specific stack trace.

PS: If you can also zip and attach `%LOCALAPPDATA%\Packages\*IntelligentTerminal*\LocalCache\Local\IntelligentTerminal\logs\` (or `%LOCALAPPDATA%\IntelligentTerminal\logs\` for unpackaged dev builds) after reproducing, that may help confirm why `wta-master` exits before the helper connects.

issues.title: Improve Copilot auth flow after install
Stucked on loading
issues.suggested_reply:
Hi @MartinSusky, could you grab a WTA log next time you hit this?

The screenshot shows <!-- from image -->Agent sessions<!-- /from image --> stuck at <!-- from image -->Loading...<!-- /from image -->, so the log should tell us whether Claude session creation or the ACP handshake is timing out.

1. Reproduce the issue.
2. Zip
   `%LOCALAPPDATA%\Packages\*IntelligentTerminal*\LocalCache\Local\IntelligentTerminal\logs\`
   (or `%LOCALAPPDATA%\IntelligentTerminal\logs\` for unpackaged dev builds).
3. Attach the zip here.

If the issue is hard to reproduce, set `WTA_LOG=debug` first to get the noisier traces.

issues.title: Agent Pane do not render markdown correctly
issues.suggested_reply:
Hi @haonanttt, could you share which **Intelligent Terminal version**
you're on? You can find it in the **About** dialog (menu "V" button →
About at the bottom). The **Windows build number** is also helpful —
run `ver` or `[Environment]::OSVersion` in a shell.

This helps us tell whether it's already fixed in a newer build.
